title: Stack Follies
description: Items and stack related tomfooleries, mostly for mod and modpack dev
body:
# Stack Follies

Plenty of item and stack related toolfooleries and utilities, for devs and users to enjoy.

This includes (but might expand beyond):
* data-driven dropped item immunity control
* animatable item models using entity model control tools (with resource-pack control)

Please don't forget to check out the wiki.
